name: agent-sdk-harness
description: Claude Code harness for building agent-sdk agents. /new-agent scaffolds a template repo (or from github.com/wailuen/agent-template); /add-tool and /add-source wire extension points; /agent-verify runs conformance and OAuth-chain probes; /provision walks credential setup from zero to live; /upgrade bumps the SDK SHA + reinstalls + verifies; /changelog shows categorised SDK changes between two SHAs; /diagnose classifies runtime failures to the exact layer; /migrate lifts an existing agent onto agent-sdk with redteam-grade testing; /sdk-issue classifies a finding and files SDK-level bugs as GitHub issues on wailuen/a2a-sdk (agent-domain findings redirected to /codify); /scenario generates JTBD scenarios; /codify captures LRN learnings; /analyze manages PRD/ADR docs; /todos generates vertical-slice wave plans; /wave executes one wave end-to-end (todos-redteam → implement → unit/phase zero-tolerance redteam → protocol audit → codify + C-NNN registration → archive); /implement runs all waves unattended; /redteam adversarially reviews against SI-1..SI-7; /debug fresh-lens root-cause analysis. Core agents: redteam, analyst, planner, codify, debug. Project agents: sdk-advisor, python-implementer. Workflow: wave-cycle.js (8-phase deterministic). Reuses agent-interop check kit (agent-stack-check + a2a/a2ui/ag-ui/mcp advisors). SDK-dev harness (at SDK root .claude/): /sdk-test full test gate + /sdk-release cut + tag + push.
